subcodes.first_line: O Rustam! The All-Merciful Lord it is Whose sun doth shine with splendour, Whose stars do gleam with radiance, and Whose clouds are laden with rain [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای رستم مهربان یزدانست که آفتابش تابان و اخترانش رخشان و ابرش پرباران و
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
